title: handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. chrysanthus
intro: Handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. chrysanthus, also known as the yellow angel's trumpet or yellow copaiba tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic effects, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Handroanthus chrysanthus subsp. chrysanthus include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
